title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 29.280 - Vacancy — governor to fill
text:
29.280.  Vacancy — governor to fill. — When a vacancy occurs in the office of state auditor the governor shall immediately appoint an auditor to fill such vacancy for the residue of the term in which the vacancy occurred, and until his successor is elected or appointed, commissioned and qualified.
(RSMo 1939 § 13016, A.L. 1945 p. 584 § 4) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11394; 1919 § 13291; 1909 § 11803
